## Description
Tree-view component for nested Enso UI data.
## Installation
Install the package:

```bash
yarn add @enso-ui/tree-view
```
## Features
- exports `TreeView` as its public surface
- keeps the Bulma presentation layer separate from the renderless/stateful layer where applicable
## Usage
```vue
<script setup>
import TreeView from '@enso-ui/tree-view./src/bulma/TreeView.vue';
</script>
```
## API
### `TreeView`

Public export available from `src/bulma/TreeView.vue`.

Props:
- `items`
- `modelValue`

Events:
- `update:modelValue`

Injects:
- `i18n`
## Depends On
- No additional Enso UI dependencies.
## Contributions
are welcome. Pull requests are great, but issues are good too.
Thank you to all the people who already contributed to Enso!
